name: Ryker
description: Ryker's a sleepy apprentice carpenter who's always promising that he'll get around to doing his job... eventually. His lack of work ethic means he doesn't get along with the diligent Martin. Often lectured by those older than him and treated as a peer by those younger than him. Although he's constantly dozing off during the day, at night a cooler, more mysterious side of him emerges. He owes a great debt to his mentor, Palmo.
creator: ᴀɴᴏɴʏᴍᴏᴜꜱ-ᴘʟᴜᴛᴏ
